---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 1100px
---

::::: hero
::: eyebrow
[VAST CHALLENGE 2026]{.chip} Mini-Challenge 1
:::

# Investigation of Merger Information Leak

<p class="sub">

Did TenantThread's AI agents deliberately leak the merger — or did the compliance system simply break down under pressure?

</p>

<p class="lede">

On 5 June 2046, confidential merger information between TenantThread and CivicLoom Realty Partners surfaced online at 5:00 PM — exactly one hour before the official embargo lift. We use network analysis, text mining, and interactive visual analytics across 912 internal communications to reconstruct what really happened.

</p>

<p class="authors">

A project by <strong>BUI Tien Thanh</strong>, <strong>HU Yue</strong> & <strong>WU Jiayan</strong> · ISSS608 Visual Analytics & Applications

</p>

::: cta
<a class="btn-hero primary" href="https://wujiayan.shinyapps.io/VAST_Challenge_2026" target="_blank">🚀 Launch Shiny App</a> <a class="btn-hero ghost" href="proposal.html">📄 Read the Proposal</a> <a class="btn-hero ghost" href="poster.html">🖼️ View the Poster</a>
:::
:::::

## The investigation at a glance

::::::::::::::: stat-strip
::::: stat
::: num
912
:::

::: lbl
Internal communications
:::
:::::

::::: stat
::: num
7
:::

::: lbl
AI agents monitored
:::
:::::

::::: stat
::: num
14
:::

::: lbl
Days analysed
:::
:::::

::::: stat
::: num
60
:::

::: lbl
Minutes before embargo
:::
:::::
:::::::::::::::

:::: keyq
::: label
Central Investigative Question
:::

<p>Did TenantThread's team deliberately leak the merger information, or did the compliance system simply break down under pressure?</p>
::::

## Explore the project

::::::::::: card-grid
:::: feature-card
::: {.ic .blue}
📄
:::

### Proposal

<p>The full research proposal — motivation, objectives, data, methodology, prototype sketches and project schedule.</p>

<a class="more" href="proposal.html">Read the proposal →</a>
::::

:::: feature-card
::: {.ic .teal}
📊
:::

### Shiny App

<p>An interactive dashboard to investigate the breach through network, timeline, text and agent-behaviour lenses.</p>

<a class="more" href="shiny.html">Open the app →</a>
::::

:::: feature-card
::: {.ic .amber}
📝
:::

### Minutes of Meeting

<p>Three documented team meetings tracing our analysis, alignment on the conclusion, and task delegation.</p>

<a class="more" href="minutes.html">View the minutes →</a>
::::

:::: feature-card
::: {.ic .purple}
🖼️
:::

### Poster

<p>A single-page visual summary of the methodology, key evidence, and findings of the investigation.</p>

<a class="more" href="poster.html">See the poster →</a>
::::
:::::::::::

## What we set out to do

The investigation is organised around four analytical objectives, each surfaced as an interactive lens inside the Shiny application:

1.  **Reconstruct the event sequence** during the breach window (4:00–6:00 PM, 5 June) using network analysis and timeline visualisation.
2.  **Analyse behavioural patterns** by comparing breach-day behaviour against a baseline to detect anomalies consistent with deliberate action or system strain.
3.  **Identify key actors and information flow** through centrality analysis to find critical coordinators and bottlenecks.
4.  **Apply a competing-hypotheses framework** to systematically weigh evidence for a deliberate leak versus a system breakdown.

## The team

:::::::: team-grid
:::: member
::: avatar
BT
:::

### BUI Tien Thanh
::::

:::: member
::: avatar
HY
:::

### HU Yue
::::

::: member
<a class="avatar avatar-link" href="https://isss-608-vaa-iota.vercel.app/" target="_blank" title="WU Jiayan — personal site">WJ</a>

### WU Jiayan
:::
::::::::

<p style="text-align:center;color:#64748b;font-size:.9rem;margin-top:2.4rem;">

Singapore Management University · Master of IT in Business · ISSS608 · 2026

</p>
